# ניני — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A personal coaching practice for teenagers that combines traditional life coaching with innovative visual therapy tools. The brand focuses on helping teens navigate digital-age challenges through 1-on-1 sessions that integrate photography therapy and styling therapy. The approach is youth-centric, speaking their language and using aesthetics and visual tools to build self-confidence and social resilience. Sessions are conducted via Zoom in a safe, accessible environment, addressing inner voice, social media comparison, and digital pressures while helping teens 'remove external filters' to find authentic self-confidence.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://-6d4d0564.zappy5.app
אימון אישי לבני נוער המשלב טיפול חזותי וסטיילינג להעצמה אמיתית. פגישות זום אישיות שבונות חוסן דיגיטלי ודימוי עצמי חזק מבפנים. בואו להסיר את הפילטרים!

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About ניני
A personal coaching practice for teenagers that combines traditional life coaching with innovative visual therapy tools. The brand focuses on helping teens navigate digital-age challenges through 1-on-1 sessions that integrate photography therapy and styling therapy. The approach is youth-centric, speaking their language and using aesthetics and visual tools to build self-confidence and social resilience. Sessions are conducted via Zoom in a safe, accessible environment, addressing inner voice, social media comparison, and digital pressures while helping teens 'remove external filters' to find authentic self-confidence.

## Target Audience
בני נוער והוריהם

## Industry
אימון אישי והעצמה
